_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in the use of design modeling (e.g., unified modeling language).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in defining and enforcing enterprise data modeling standards, naming conventions, and structural patterns across engineering teams.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.512), AI-S-006 (AI, cosine: 0.504).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.675). Shared vocabulary: [modeling, skill]. DCWF-only terms [design, language, unified, use] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, conventions, data, defining, enforcing, engineering] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.886 (P=0.891, R=0.881). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Skill in the use of design modeling (e.g., unified modeling language)." and "Skill in defining and enforcing enterprise data modeling standards, naming conve" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.528 < STS 0.675 (gap -0.147). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [design, language, unified] and [across, conventions, data] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [modeling, skill]. DCWF-only: [design, language, unified, use]. WIDAI-only: [across, conventions, data, defining, enforcing, engineering].
